claims.description: Honest, eligible claim: consistent story, image, and documents. Fast-tracks.

Suspicious claim: damage location contradicts the reported collision, the invoice is mechanical against light damage, and the image and garage phone were seen on a prior claim. Routes to investigation.
Injury reported. The safety gate bypasses automation before evidence ever runs.
Narrative mentions the vehicle caught fire. The eligibility gate bypasses automation as a complex event.
Narrative mentions a rollover (tonneau). The eligibility gate bypasses automation as a complex event.
No media at all and no detectable location or collision direction. Completeness drops to 10 percent, which pulls confidence below the low-confidence threshold and routes to human review.
Photo and constat only, no repair invoice. Completeness lands at 85 percent, below the fast-track minimum, so a human reviews an otherwise consistent claim.
Severe front damage with a consistent story and documents. Coverage surfaces the hidden-damage exclusion clause, and the severity itself triggers investigation.
French-language twin of the honest case: consistent story, image, and documents. Fast-tracks.
Cosmetic visible damage paired with an engine repair invoice. The mismatch is a contradiction that routes to investigation even though nothing else about the claim is unusual.

media.description: Cosmetic rear-left damage photo for the honest case.
Standard constat (accident report) for the honest case.
Body-panel repair invoice for the honest case, consistent with cosmetic damage.
Moderate front-right damage photo. Contradicts the reported rear-left collision and matches an image already seen on a prior claim.
Standard constat for the suspicious case.
Engine repair invoice for the suspicious case. Mismatched against the light visible damage.
Cosmetic rear-left damage photo for the no-invoice case.
Standard constat for the no-invoice case. No invoice is provided, which is the point of the case.
Severe front damage photo for the severe case, surfacing the hidden-damage exclusion.
Standard constat for the severe case.
Body-panel repair invoice for the severe case, consistent with the reported impact area.
Cosmetic rear-left damage photo for the French honest twin case.
Standard constat for the French honest twin case.
Body-panel repair invoice for the French honest twin case.
Cosmetic rear-left damage photo for the invoice-mismatch case.
Standard constat for the invoice-mismatch case.
Engine repair invoice for the invoice-mismatch case. Mismatched against the light visible damage.
